'''Bran Kemple''' was a [[Color/Legends|brown]]-haired [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] with pale green skin. When [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] first met him, he was a small gunrunner in [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]]. He later became [[town boss]] of [[Plett's Well|Plawal]] after the disappearance of [[Nubblyk]] the [[Slyte]]. He smuggled [[vine-coffee]] and ran card games at the [[Jungle Lust]].

{{Char-stub}}
